title: The Building Societies (Amendment) Act, 2025

sections.title: This Act may be cited as the Building Societies Short title
sections.body:
(Amendment) Act, 2025, and shall be read as one with the Building Cap. 412
Societies Act, in this Act referred to as the principal Act.

sections.title: The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section 130 Repeal and
sections.body:
replacement
and substitution therefor of the following:
of section
130

sections.title: The financial year of a building society shall be a Financial
sections.body:
period of twelve months, ending on 31st December in each year
year.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 4.00 each.
126
